title: AgentTaskPayload
description: Structured payload passed to build, review, and QA agents describing a single scoped task.

branch.description: Feature branch name. Should follow feat/ISSUE-<number>-short-name convention.

objective.description: Plain-language description of what must be implemented or fixed.
examples: Implement the requested feature or fix

constraints.description: Hard constraints the agent must not violate.

acceptance_criteria.description: Testable conditions that must be true for the task to be considered complete.
examples: No visible regression in main flows

files_of_interest.description: Files the agent should focus on or is expected to modify.

review_focus.description: Specific review lenses the scrutinizer and QA agent should apply.

artifacts.description: Links to key GitHub artifacts associated with this task.

issue_url.description: Full URL of the originating GitHub Issue.

pr_url.description: Full URL of the associated Pull Request. Empty string if not yet opened.
